package.name: px4_ros2_collision_prevention
package.description: ROS 2 Humble node that converts RealSense D435/D435i depth frames into px4_msgs/ObstacleDistance messages published to /fmu/in/obstacle_distance. PX4's built-in Collision Prevention module reads this topic (via uXRCE-DDS) and brakes the vehicle when an obstacle enters the CP_DIST envelope. Works with PX4 firmware >= v1.14.
